Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: We can use the Unit Reference to read and understand a bit more about the sensors available to our forces.
With the Ka-27PL selected, right click on it and then open Unit Reference. This will open the helicopter's reference page. Its sensors are listed here.
Click on the 'Wet Eye (Surface Directed Search Radar)' listed for the Ka-27PL to read about its characteristics.
